element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental enemy defeat mechanics established before dungeon encounters
Progressive power scaling through gear acquisition
Life bar expansion through world exploration

element_introduction_order.element: Regional companion characters (Priscilla, Hotta, Shabo, Rotto)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Ability-gated progression (wall breaking, enemy assistance, hazard navigation)

element_introduction_order.element: Magic system (Return magic for inn teleportation)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Late-game convenience; early game lacks this makes inn returns tedious
Companions sit out boss fights; player isolated for peak difficulty
Backtracking required; geography becomes core navigation puzzle

typical_relief_triggers: Acquiring companion ability in new region
Unlocking Return magic for fast travel
typical_tension_triggers: Early-game inn returns without magic (tedium as tension)
Regional hazards specific to terrain (Ice Caverns, Volcano, etc.)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Adventure-paced with regional cycles: exploration→combat→equipment upgrade→regional boss→relief. Tension builds through dungeon sequences and eases in towns. Early game friction (tedious inn returns) bleeds into mid-game until Return magic acquired.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden rooms uncovered by companion abilities (Hotta breaking walls, etc.); coins and hearts scattered requiring thoroughness
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden fountains and concealed areas enabled by regional companions; breaking certain walls reveals passages

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction of platforming and basic combat. Towns provide safe zones. Inn access establishes checkpoints. Companion (Priscilla) offers healing support.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Regional variety introduces specialized hazards (Ice Caverns, Volcano). New companions (Hotta, Shabo) unlock progression gates. Equipment variety increases, requiring strategic choices. Boss encounters begin isolating player.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final companions (Rotto) handle late-stage hazards. Full equipment roster available. Interconnected world demands memory and navigation skill. End-game bosses with no companion support.
notable_spikes: Boss encounters (companions sit out, player isolated)
Ice Caverns sequence (temperature hazard with Shabo assistance)
Early game inn returns without Return magic (mechanical friction spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each region introduces a unique companion with ability-gated progression. Companion stays in region, forcing player to master regional hazards before moving forward. Companions unable to act during boss fights, creating isolated challenge moments.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Lilypad (Dwarf village with Hotta) - wall-breaking gates access to temple; Childam (Darkworld with Shabo) - scythe attacks aid Ice Caverns; Begonia (Dragon village with Rotto) - dragon assistance through Volcano

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe town spaces (Purapril, Alsedo, Lilypad, Childam, Begonia) alternate with dangerous exploration zones. Towns provide NPC trading, health recovery, and save functionality at inns. Dungeons/temples isolate player, remove companion support, and escalate hazard intensity.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Purapril (opening hub) transitions to regional temples and hazard zones

notable_level_patterns.description: Swords, shields, armor, and boots of increasing power unlock through monster defeats and NPC trades. Gear acquisition gates both combat difficulty and traversal capability. Resource management (money) forces strategic purchasing.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout game - stronger armor enables survival of regional hazards; stronger swords enable boss defeats

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple regions interconnect, requiring revisits. Early game tedium (returning to inns without magic) transforms into strategic planning once Return magic available. Geography becomes puzzle alongside combat.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Monster World regions form web requiring navigation memory and Return spell use for efficiency
